description_long: This is a stylized doll with a matte black face and hands, featuring long, straight, silvery-white hair that cascades down past the shoulders and back. The doll wears a simple black pinafore dress over a white collared shirt, giving it a classic, monochrome appearance. The facial features are minimalistic, with large, rounded eyes, a small nose, and a wide, smiling mouth, all rendered in white for high contrast. The hands are positioned in front of the torso, with fingers slightly curled, suggesting a gentle, welcoming gesture. The hair is voluminous and textured, with individual strands visible, and it covers much of the back and sides. The overall design is modern and clean, with a focus on bold contrasts and smooth surfaces.
description: A stylized doll with long silvery-white hair, a black face and hands, and a black pinafore dress over a white collared shirt. The doll has a minimalistic, smiling face and a modern, monochrome look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, white collared shirt, black pinafore dress, and both hands raised in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length and volume of the silvery-white hair, with one hand partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the flowing silvery-white hair, obscuring most of the body and clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the hair's texture and the profile of the face, with one hand visible in front.
attribute_clothing_style: Classic monochrome style with a black pinafore dress layered over a white collared shirt, evoking a minimalist and timeless look with no visible patterns or embellishments.
attribute_pose: The doll's torso is upright, with both arms bent at the elbows and hands raised in front of the chest, fingers slightly curled. The head is facing forward, and the legs are not visible.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling expression with wide, upturned mouth, large open eyes, and neutral eyebrows, conveying a friendly and cheerful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, silvery-white hair that flows past the shoulders and down the back, with a center part and soft, natural texture.
